text.tspan: Llama 3.1 8B Q4 on my Spark, 500-token prompt + 200-token reply. Ollama published rates.
decode 200 tokens at ~38 tok/s (Ollama published, Llama 3.1 8B Q4)
Total wallclock: ~5.3 seconds for 200 output tokens
User sees first character at ~66 ms (TTFT). Sees full reply at ~5.3 s.
Where the time goes, broken down
Decode dwarfs everything. That's why decode-format choice (Day 4) matters most.
10x the prompt and prefill goes to ~660 ms, but decode time stays the same.
Long prompts hurt TTFT; long answers hurt total wallclock.
Decode rate from Ollama's published Spark benchmark page, single-stream Llama 3.1 8B Q4_K_M.
